Game.Name: Pinball Pinball (Japan)
Game.plot: Pinball Dreams is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Spidersoft and published by GameTek,which was released in 1994.Cheat: See the CreditsSelect any pinball game and play it. Once the ball appears and lands, exit back to the main menu. You'll be taken back to the main menu. Wait there and you'll be taken to the following screens: high scores, title screen, main menu, high scores. After that, you'll see the 21st. Century Entertainment logo and will then be taken to a Spidersoft screen with the game's staff.
